sourcesContent:
i = 0
evens = []
evens.push(i) while (i += 1) < 8 when i % 2 == 0
j = 10
downs = []
downs.push(j) until (j -= 1) <= 4 when j % 2 == 1
k = 0
vals = (k * 3 while (k += 1) < 5 when k != 2)
m = 0
while (m += 1) < 6 when m > 3
  last = m
n = 9
until (n -= 2) < 3 when n > 4
  edge = n
sum = evens.length + downs.length + vals.length + last + edge
